title: hieracium murorum subsp. oligopolium
intro: Hieracium murorum subsp. oligopolium, also known as Wall Hawkweed, is a subspecies of the Hieracium murorum plant, which is a type of flowering plant in the dandelion family. The plant is traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, which can help to soothe skin irritations and wounds. The health benefits of Hieracium murorum subsp. oligopolium include its ability to reduce inflammation, promote wound healing, and support the immune system. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be applied topically or taken internally to harness its medicinal properties.
